tools.heading: Refine
tools.shortcutHint: B brush  E erase  P prompt  M marker

classification.title: Override AI classification
classification.subtitle: Replace the AI-predicted tumor class with a manual one
classification.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why the AI class is being overridden (required for audit)

conflict.title: Offline edit conflict
conflict.subtitle: The case was modified on the server after your offline edit
conflict.body: Choose how to resolve the conflict. Your choice is recorded in the audit log.
conflict.keepMineDescription: Your local edit wins. The server version is overwritten.
conflict.keepTheirsDescription: Discard your local edit and accept the server version.

takeover.title: Release review seat?
takeover.body: Another reviewer is requesting this case.
